linkedin.text:
Your top performers don't remember the bonus. They remember Monaco.

Recognition that actually moves people isn't a line on a payslip — it's a moment they retell for years. The principality delivers that moment by default: harbour-side galas, private yacht evenings, Michelin tables, terraces above the Mediterranean.

The hard part isn't the dream. It's the logistics behind it — access, timing, protocol, a hundred moving parts that have to be invisible on the night. That's the part we own, so your group only ever experiences the magic.

Uproduction has produced incentive programs across 120+ countries since 2010. From business to pleasure — we design the reward your best people earned.

Planning a 2026 or 2027 incentive? DM "MONACO" or book a call and we'll map a program around your group.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventDesign

Some destinations say "thank you." Monaco says it loud. 🛥️

Harbour-side galas, private yacht evenings, Michelin tables — and all the impossible logistics handled by us, so your team only feels the magic. From business to pleasure, this is what rewarding your best people actually looks like.

image_prompt: Sweeping aerial drone view of Monaco at golden hour, the harbour packed with white superyachts, terracotta rooftops climbing the cliff, the Mediterranean glittering deep blue, distant mountains, no people visible up close. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
